policy: Verified positive and negative news feeds a bounded, time-decaying simulation overlay; base assumptions remain owner-controlled.

items.headline: O previews GPT-5.6 Sol and tool-calling improvements
items.summary: O releases details for GPT-5.6 with efficiency and autonomy claims (e.g., fewer output tokens and faster completions). If accurate, could improve compute economics and agent reliability in production workflows.

items.headline: O reveals LLM-optimized inference chip with Broadcom
items.summary: O and G announce an “LLM-optimized inference chip,” signaling continued inference cost/latency focus. Follow-on impact depends on adoption and any stated performance or deployment benchmarks.

items.headline: G raises $650M to scale GroqCloud capacity toward 200MW by 2027
items.summary: G announces $650M growth capital to expand AI inference cloud and target ~200MW by 2027; cites 13 data centers and processing trillions of tokens weekly. Supports capacity/revenue scaling assumptions.
